title: DO NOT CALL REGISTRY - 211info
text: FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION NORTHWEST REGION DO NOT CALL REGISTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a registry designed to stop unwanted telemarketing calls on landlines and mobile phones. 915 Second Avenue Suite 2896 Seattle, WA 98174 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (888) 382-1222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 382-1222 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information. Calls should be made from the number that individuals want to place on the registry. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Unsolicited Advertising Opt Out Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION INFORMATION SERVICES - IDENTITY THEFT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION NORTHWEST REGION
